description: Delete all cloud worker, R2 backup, and usage worker files/directories. Fix machineId ESM error. Remove node-machine-id dependency.
steps: Delete the entire cloud/ directory (D1 worker service)
Delete the entire WorkerProxy/ directory (Cloudflare relay proxy worker)
Delete cloud library files: src/lib/cloudSync.ts, src/lib/cloudWorkerClient.ts, src/lib/cloudRequestAuth.ts, src/lib/cloudUrlResolver.ts, src/lib/cloudUsageSync.ts, src/lib/initCloudSync.ts
Delete cloud API routes: src/app/api/cloud/ (entire directory), src/app/api/cloud-urls/ (entire directory)

Delete all R2 files: src/lib/r2BackupClient.ts, src/lib/r2BackupLocalDb.ts, src/lib/r2BackupRuntime.ts, src/lib/r2BackupScheduler.ts, src/lib/r2BackupSchedulerRuntime.ts, src/lib/r2BackupSqliteRuntime.ts, src/lib/r2ObjectClient.ts, src/lib/r2RuntimeArtifactState.ts, src/lib/r2RuntimeArtifacts.ts, src/lib/r2RuntimePublisher.ts, src/lib/r2SqliteFingerprint.ts
Delete R2 API routes: src/app/api/r2/ (entire directory)
Delete usage worker directory: src/lib/usageWorker/ (entire directory including client.ts, worker.ts, workerBootstrap.ts, scheduler.ts, config.ts, prioritizer.ts, aliasLoader.ts)
Delete usage worker API routes: src/app/api/usage-worker/ (entire directory)
Delete the broken machineId file: src/shared/utils/machineId.tsx

Create new ESM-compatible src/shared/utils/machineId.ts (not .tsx) that exports getConsistentMachineId and getRawMachineId using node:crypto and node:os (NO node-machine-id dependency). Keep the same salt 'axonrouter-machine-id-salt' and same output format (16-char hex substring of sha256 hash).

Update src/shared/utils/machine.ts to import from the new ./machineId (not ./machineId.tsx) and remove the cloud sync functions (syncProviderDataToCloud, getProvidersNeedingRefresh) - just export getMachineId

Delete all related test files: tests/unit/cloud-deprecated-writes.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-morph-worker-routes.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-runtime-config-loader.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-sync.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-url-status-route.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-urls-race.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-usage-poller-race.test.ts, tests/unit/cloud-worker-client.test.ts, tests/unit/embeddings.cloud.test.ts, tests/unit/r2-backup-route-semantics.test.ts, tests/unit/r2-backup-scheduler.test.ts, tests/unit/r2-route.test.ts, tests/unit/r2-settings-route-scheduler.test.ts, tests/unit/r2-test-route.test.ts, tests/unit/usage-worker-prioritizer.test.ts
acceptance_criteria: All listed files and directories are deleted
New src/shared/utils/machineId.ts is ESM-compatible (uses import not require)
No .tsx extension on the new machineId file
verification: Confirm deleted files no longer exist with ls commands
Confirm new machineId.ts exists and uses ESM imports
findings: Also deleted tests/unit/handlers-runtime-config.test.ts and tests/unit/admin-register-runtime.test.ts (not in original list but reference deleted cloud/ directory). Created src/lib/initApp.ts as replacement for deleted initCloudSync.ts (used by layout.tsx, page.ts, init/route.ts). Removed isCurrentCloudEnabled from settingsAccess.ts. Fixed tunnelConnectionRuntime.ts and passwordStoreRuntime.ts to use os.hostname() instead of node-machine-id. Removed R2 Storage UI card from SettingsPageClient.tsx. Removed CloudTab from EndpointPageClient.tsx. Inlined normalizeUsageWorkerSettings in normalize.ts. All 998 remaining tests pass.
